hooks.name: Auto Commit Change
hooks.description: Whenever a file is edited, prompts the agent to check for uncommitted changes and commit them to GitHub following Conventional Commits format.

action.prompt: A file was just edited. Check if there are meaningful uncommitted changes using `git status`. If there are staged or unstaged changes, stage them with `git add` for the relevant files, then commit with a Conventional Commits message (feat:, fix:, refactor:, test:, docs:, chore:). Do not push to remote unless explicitly asked.
